brionna jones.comment: Jones (knee) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx.

courtney vandersloot.comment: Vandersloot (knee) is out for Wednesday's game against Toronto.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

aaliyah edwards.comment: Edwards (nose) won't return to Wednesday's game against Portland. She finished with zero points (0-2 FT) and two rebounds across five minutes.

brittney griner.comment: Griner (rib) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Fire.

leila lacan.comment: Lacan remains overseas, so the Sun temporarily suspended her contract Thursday, Khristina Williams of MSG Network reports.

paige bueckers.comment: Bueckers (leg) is probable for Thursday's game against the Aces.

alanna smith.comment: Smith (illness) is probable for Thursday's game against the Aces.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

caitlin clark.comment: Clark (back) is listed as probable for Thursday's game against Golden State, Chloe Peterson of The Indianapolis Star reports.

bree hall.comment: Hall is probable to play Thursday against the Valkyries due to an illness, Chloe Peterson of The Indianapolis Star reports.

justine pissott.comment: Pissott (coach's decision) is out for Friday's game against the Valkyries.

kelsey plum.comment: Plum was diagnosed with an ankle sprain following Tuesday's practice and will be re-evaluated in one week, per source.

laura ziegler.comment: Ziegler (coach's decision) won't play against the Aces on Saturday.

sania feagin.comment: Feagin (leg) is listed as out for Saturday's game against the Aces.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) is out for Thursday's game in Dallas.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (foot) is expected to remain out for another 2-to-3 weeks, Pat Borzi of MinnPost reports.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier underwent surgery on her left ankle March 24 and is expected to return to on-court activities in early June, Sara Jane Gamelli of BallisLife.com reports.

marine fauthoux.comment: Fauthoux (knee) will be joining the Liberty for the 2026 season, Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com reports.

shay ciezki.comment: Ciezki (coach's decision) won't play Wednesday against the Liberty.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb will undergo an arthroscopy on Thursday to remove a loose body in her left knee. She will be re-evaluated in four to six weeks, Shane Young of the Mercury's official site reports.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Mystics.

dominique malonga.comment: Malonga (concussion) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Mystics.

ezi magbegor.comment: The Storm announced Monday that Magbegor is expected to miss at least 6-8 weeks due to a right foot injury, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports.

julie allemand.comment: Allemand (groin) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sky.

isabelle harrison.comment: Harrison (hand) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Fire.

temi fagbenle.comment: Fagbenle (shoulder) is unlikely to return before the end of May, per Chelsea Leite of TSN.
